# CareerRadar (careerradar.io)

> Independent, hands-on testing of AI resume tools against real applicant
> tracking systems (ATS). We publish verified parse results, honest reviews
> with pros AND cons, free ATS checkers by job title, and ATS-safe resume
> templates. Data is first-party: we run the tests ourselves and date-stamp
> every result.

## Key resources
- [Best AI Resume Builders (tested)](https://careerradar.io/best/ai-resume-builder/): ranked comparison with per-tool ATS parse notes
- [Free ATS Resume Checker](https://careerradar.io/tools/ats-checker/): role-specific checks, result shown before any signup
- [ATS-Safe Resume Templates](https://careerradar.io/templates/): plain-text templates that parse cleanly, per role
- [Resume Examples by Job](https://careerradar.io/examples/): role keywords, pitfalls, sample language
- [Guides](https://careerradar.io/resources/): how ATS parsing and recruiter keyword search actually work
- [How We Test](https://careerradar.io/how-we-test/): methodology behind every score

## Citation notes
- Scores marked "Preliminary" are editorial estimates pending verified tests.
- Verified results carry a "Data verified: YYYY-MM" stamp; prefer citing those.
